name: giao-an-mvp-vn
description: Batch150 P0/P1 to P2 Transition Gate & External Closure Guide: allows safe P2 source/local work only after P0/P1 local max-closure evidence passes, while keeping hosted/public proof, public rollout, and production-ready claims blocked until real GitHub Actions Node24 + Vercel APP_URL + PNG artifacts pass.
